---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea, improvement, or new feature
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
Provide a clear and concise description of the feature or improvement.

## Problem Statement
Describe the problem or need that this feature would solve.

## Proposed Solution
Describe how you would like this feature to work.

## Possible Alternatives
Describe any alternative solutions or features you have considered.

## Additional Context
Add any other context, examples, or references here.
